metadata.title: Automatic Table Of Contents
metadata.description: Create a table of contents in a note, that updates itself when the note changes

regex.source:
.log(
    ...[
      `%cAutomatic Table Of Contents %c${type}:\n`,
      'color: orange; font-weight: bold',
      'font-weight: bold',
      data,
    ],
  )
regex.target:
.log(
    ...[
      `%c自动生成目录 %c${type}：`,
      'color: orange; font-weight: bold',
      'font-weight: bold',
      data,
    ],
  )

regex.source: name: 'Insert table of contents (with available options)'
